chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1029 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1789/2023. 2. For orders on office objections No.1, 14, 25 & 28. 3. For orders on CMA No.1788/2023. 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA No.1790/2023. 23.04.2026 Mr. Khalid Mahmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 1,4&5. Per learned counsel, the reference application is time barred and states that identical reference applications have been disposed of including vide order dated 28.01.2026 passed in SCRA 1032 of 2023. Learned counsel states that the reference application may also be disposed of for the same reason and upon same terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
